title: Raptors stun Cavs with overtime win, force Game 7
body:
In a thrilling turn of events, the Toronto Raptors have forced a decisive Game 7 in their best-of-seven series against the Cleveland Cavaliers, after emerging victorious in a nail-biting 112-110 overtime win in Game 6. The victory, which took place at the Scotiabank Arena, has tied the series at 3-3, setting the stage for a high-stakes finale on Sunday in Cleveland. The outcome of the game was far from certain, with the Cavaliers appearing to be in control before a late turnover and an improbable 3-pointer by the Raptors turned the tide of the contest.

The Raptors' win is a testament to their resilience and determination, as they overcame a strong performance by the Cavaliers to secure the win. The game was marked by intense competition, with both teams giving it their all in a bid to gain the upper hand. The Cavaliers, who were seeking to close out the series, were unable to capitalize on their chances, and ultimately fell short in the extra period. The loss will be a tough pill to swallow for the Cavaliers, who had been hoping to avoid a winner-takes-all scenario in Game 7.

The Raptors, on the other hand, will be buoyed by their victory, which has given them new life in the series. They will now head to Cleveland with momentum on their side, knowing that they have the ability to beat the Cavaliers on their home court. The team's performance in Game 6 was marked by several standout moments, including the clutch 3-pointer that sealed the win. The shot, which came as a result of a well-executed play, will be remembered as one of the highlights of the series.

As the series heads to its climax, the stakes will be higher than ever. The winner of Game 7 will advance to the next round, while the loser will be eliminated from the playoffs. The pressure will be intense, with both teams knowing that their season hangs in the balance. The Cavaliers, who have been inconsistent at times during the series, will need to find a way to overcome their flaws and produce a complete performance if they are to emerge victorious. The Raptors, meanwhile, will be looking to build on their momentum and secure a spot in the next round.

The stage is now set for a thrilling conclusion to the series, with the two teams set to face off in a winner-takes-all showdown. The game promises to be an intense and closely contested affair, with both teams giving it their all in a bid to emerge victorious. The atmosphere at the arena is likely to be electric, with the crowd playing a significant role in the outcome of the game. As the teams take to the court, they will be aware that the stakes are high, and that only one of them will be able to advance to the next round.

As the basketball world waits with bated breath for the outcome of Game 7, one thing is certain - the series between the Raptors and the Cavaliers has been an unforgettable ride. With its twists and turns, the series has kept fans on the edge of their seats, and the finale promises to be no exception. The question on everyone's mind is - which team will emerge victorious and advance to the next round? Only time will tell, but one thing is for sure - the conclusion of the series will be an event not to be missed.
